title: ampelocissus edulis
intro: Ampelocissus edulis, also known as the Indian grapevine or wine grape, is a deciduous vine native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ampelocissus edulis include reducing fever, treating diarrhea, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Ampelocissus edulis include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
